senses.definition_en: an advantage or profit gained from something

examples.en: Regular exercise has many health benefits.
examples.fa: ورزش منظم فواید زیادی برای سلامتی دارد.

senses.definition_en: a payment made by a government or an organization to someone entitled to receive it

examples.en: She receives unemployment benefit while looking for a new job.
examples.fa: او در حین جستجوی شغل جدید، مقرری بیکاری دریافت می‌کند.

senses.definition_en: to receive an advantage from something; to be helped by it

examples.en: Both companies benefited from the new trade agreement.
examples.fa: هر دو شرکت از توافق تجاری جدید بهره‌مند شدند.

idioms.phrase: give someone the benefit of the doubt
idioms.translation: به نفع کسی قضاوت کردن در شرایط نامشخص
idioms.example_en: I don't know if he's telling the truth, but I'll give him the benefit of the doubt.
idioms.example_fa: نمی‌دانم او راست می‌گوید یا نه، اما به نفع او قضاوت می‌کنم.

notes: A good example of a single headword with two distinct grammatical roles (noun and verb) — see how parts_of_speech supports this directly.
